errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

empty.title: Search your workspace
empty.hint: Notes, files, tasks and community posts on your board.

noResults.title: Nothing found for "{q}"
noResults.hint: Try a shorter or different word.

openedEmpty.title: Nothing opened yet
openedEmpty.description: Notes, files, quizzes and plans you open will show up here.

uploadedEmpty.title: Nothing uploaded yet
uploadedEmpty.description: Files and test papers you upload will show up here.

student.heading: Your whole study life, in one place.
student.sub: Plan smarter, learn faster, and stay calm before every exam — with AI that studies alongside you.

teacher.heading: Your whole teaching life, in one place.
teacher.sub: Plan lessons, grade paper tests, and track every student — with AI that does the paperwork for you.

student.heading: One tidy home for everything.
student.sub: Every tool you need to prep, revise, and cross the finish line — designed to feel calm.

teacher.heading: One tidy staff room for everything.
teacher.sub: Every tool you need to plan, grade, and coach — designed to give you your evenings back.

auth.name: Name
auth.passwordHelper: Use at least 8 characters. Mix letters, numbers, and symbols for stronger security.

otp.emailHelper: We'll email you a 6-digit code. No link to click.
otp.codeHelper: Codes expire in 5 minutes. Check spam if you don't see it.
otp.codeExpired: That code has expired. Ask for a new one.
otp.codeInvalid: That code isn't right. Double-check and try again.
otp.rateLimit: You're going too fast. Wait a minute and try again.
otp.sendError: Couldn't send the code. Check the email address and try again.
otp.verifyError: Couldn't verify the code. Try again.
otp.enterNameFirst: Enter your name above, then we'll send the code.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Log in to pick up where you left off.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.termsPre: By continuing you agree to our
signup.studentHelper: Study, plan, and revise with AI
signup.teacherHelper: Plan lessons and grade papers with AI

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Your subject notes, scoped to your syllabus.

empty.title: No notes here yet
empty.description: Start jotting your first note — organised by subject, searchable, and always in sync.

community.title: Community
community.description: Notes shared by peers on your board, class and medium.

empty.title: Nothing shared here yet
empty.description: When your peers share notes, they'll show up here once a teacher approves them. Want to be the first?

board.title: Which board are you studying?
board.description: This tailors your notes, papers and AI answers to the right syllabus.

medium.title: Pick your medium
medium.description: Your study material — notes, papers and flashcards — will be in this language.

class.title: What class are you in?
class.description: We'll load the right chapters and past papers for your class.

subjects.title: Choose your subjects
subjects.description: We've pre-selected the usual ones. Tap to adjust.
subjects.empty: No subjects available for this combination yet.

language.title: Interface language
language.description: The language of buttons and menus. Your study material stays in your chosen medium.
language.note: Study content follows your {medium} medium — only the app's interface changes here.

summary.title: All set — quick check
summary.description: Everything look right? You can change any of this later in settings.

done.title: You're all set, let's go!
done.description: Your workspace is personalised for {board} · {medium} · Class {class}.
